page_metadata.biotools__summary: ODM Clinical Data Generator is a tool that produces artificial study data for a given Operational Data Model (ODM) file. This synthetic study data can be used e.g. for the evaluation of other ODM-based tools.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ODM Clinical Data Generator is a tool that produces artificial study data for a given Operational Data Model (ODM) file. This synthetic study data can be used e.g. for the evaluation of other ODM-based tools.
